channel.title: AI on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: # Why Jobs Are No Longer Enough in the AI Economy
item.description: *Work, ownership, and the new architecture of economic security*By Po-Sung(Sinclair) HuangFor decades, people believed that working hard was enough.In the AI era, that assumption is quietly breaking.N

item.title: # AI Was Never Sudden: A 30-Year View on the Great Repricing of Human Talent
item.description: From early data systems and process automation to generative AI, technology did not arrive as a sudden rupture. It has been moving steadily toward human cognitive work for decades.From dBase and enter

item.title: # Beyond the GPU: What the AI Infrastructure Buildout Means for the Real Economy
item.description: From compute bottlenecks to industrial consequences.*From compute bottlenecks to industrial consequences — where value may actually concentrate through 2030***Series:** AI Compute Supply Chain | Part

item.title: When AI Starts Predicting the Next Scientific Question
item.description: AI may not just accelerate science. It may begin to shape which questions emerge first.A new study in Nature Machine Intelligence suggests AI may do more than summarise knowledge or accelerate discove

item.title: What Are CoWoS, HBM, and ABF - And Why Do They Matter So Much in the AI Era?
item.description: A plain-language walkthrough of CoWoS, HBM, and ABF — what they actually are, why they are always mentioned together, and how they map onto Taiwan's role in the global AI supply chain.

item.title: The Bottleneck Nobody Is Pricing In: Where AI Compute Really Breaks
item.description: Every layer that looks solved hides another constraint beneath it. A deep look at CoWoS, HBM, and ABF substrate — the three physical bottlenecks shaping AI infrastructure.

item.title: AI Drug Discovery Is Not Just About Speed
item.description: What AI really changes in drug discovery is the way search space is organized — not just speed.

item.title: Interface Control May Matter More Than Website Ownership
item.description: The next battle for brand power will be fought through control over the layer where demand is matched to supply.

item.title: Trust Still Comes Before Efficiency
item.description: AI does not replace trust. It amplifies the value of trust by making it more scalable.

item.title: AlphaFold 3 and the Future of Drug Discovery
item.description: A brief observation from my research: AlphaFold 3's ability to predict protein-ligand interactions i...
